title: How a Godly Man Is the Same Guy Sober and Three Drinks In
caption:
Every guy has a sober version of himself he shows the room, and a looser version he only shows a few people.

Here's the uncomfortable part. The sober version isn't the real one just because it's better behaved. James calls a man like that double-minded, unstable in everything he does.

Alcohol doesn't create anything new in you. It just loosens the grip on what was already there.

A godly man isn't the guy who holds it together in front of people. He's the guy who's the same guy when nobody's grading him. That's why he brings a sober-minded brother into the room instead of hiding from one.

#faith #christianmen #integrity #godlymen #manofgod #scripture
